execution.nextRequiredTarget: Execute the mandatory bugfix-fastlane stabilize phase against the harden-verified, regression-clean, gaps-confirmed SCOPE-01 fix without modifying planning or certification.

scopeInventory.name: Sequence Heavy Hydration After Shared Shell Readiness

scopeProgress.name: Sequence Heavy Hydration After Shared Shell Readiness

transitionRequests.reason: Adopt or amend the grounded controlling-path analysis and smallest no-bypass startup-sequencing design before planning, test, or source changes.
transitionRequests.resolutionSummary: Adopted the measured main-thread starvation RCA and reconciled the smallest page-local sequencing design: immediate cache-first render, generic ready-marker/event barrier, exactly-once heavy hydration, unchanged timeout/shared modules/data owners, and a mandatory persistent adversarial RED before implementation.

transitionRequests.reason: Reconcile plan-owned SCOPE-01, scenario-manifest, test-plan, and DoD contracts to the adopted startup sequence. Keep the named no-interception E2E as a persistent test that bubbles.test must create and observe RED against unchanged production before implementation; preserve all parent Feature 012, Scope 04, shared-module, timeout, and data-owner boundaries.
transitionRequests.resolutionSummary: Reconciled the one-scope executable handoff to immediate cache-first render, the existing generic shell marker/event, page-local exactly-once heavy hydration, the unchanged 10-second all-route canary, native request observation without interception, and protected shared/source/worker/provider/option owners. Implementation remains disabled until bubbles.test creates TP-BUG001-02 and records its pre-fix RED against unchanged production.

transitionRequests.reason: All six Test Plan rows and the isolated rollback rehearsal are GREEN on current bytes. Reconcile only plan-owned DoD checkboxes and SCOPE-01 status from the recorded evidence; do not modify certification.
transitionRequests.resolutionSummary: Checked all six Core Outcomes, all six Test Evidence items, and the grouped Build Quality Gate only where direct report evidence exists; set the execution-side SCOPE-01 status to done; preserved top-level in_progress and all certification fields; routed the next required bugfix-fastlane phase to bubbles.regression.

executionHistory.summary: Created the complete Feature 012 child bug packet, reproduced the unchanged all-23 canary twice, measured shell-resource versus main-thread timing, localized the missing shell-before-hydration dependency and RLTKR/RLCTX amplification, planned one bounded repair with an adversarial no-interception regression and rollback, and preserved all production, tests, parent scope/status/certification, Scope 04, option-source, and framework bytes.

Adopted and reconciled the measured BUG-001 RCA into one active design truth. The repair remains one page-local ready-marker/event barrier with immediate cache-first paint, exactly-once heavy hydration, unchanged shared modules/timeout/data owners, and a required persistent adversarial RED before implementation. No production, test, plan, report, parent, Scope 04, certification, or policy field was modified.

Reconciled SCOPE-01, test-plan.json, scenario-manifest.json, six-row Test Plan and six-item test-evidence DoD parity to the adopted design. The handoff preserves immediate cache-first render, the generic shell-ready marker/event, page-local exactly-once hydration, the unchanged 10-second all-route canary, native request observation without interception, and all protected ownership boundaries. Implementation dispatch remains disabled pending TP-BUG001-02 pre-fix RED evidence against unchanged production.

Created the exact TP-BUG001-02 persistent System Chrome regression and ran the exact focused command against unchanged options-flow-feed-lab.html. The real first same-origin delta request was /data/options/SPY.json with cacheFirstOwnerPainted=true and shellReadyAtStart=false, so the test failed on the planned ordering assertion rather than Chrome, server, selector, or request availability. Production, timeout, shared modules, parent Feature 012, Scope 04, plan-owned DoD/status, and certification remain unchanged; post-fix verification is still required.

Reviewed and recorded the adopted one-page startup repair: synchronous cache-first paint is retained, one page-local boolean is set before the existing fetchDelta call, and hydration waits on the generic ready marker or one initial rlviews:change event. TP-BUG001-02 is GREEN with one 12-path cycle. Protected shared hashes match the pre-fix packet, while plan DoD, scope status, parent Feature 012, Scope 04, and certification remain unchanged.

Independently executed all six SCOPE-01 Test Plan rows on current repaired bytes and completed the OS-temp rollback rehearsal. The unchanged all-23 canary emitted 23 success records with zero skips, the exact focused title proved cache-first and shell-ready ordering with one 12-path cycle, the complete two-file System Chrome suite passed 5/5, the broad selftest passed 712/712, regression and direct scans passed, all 90 dirty paths were classified, and protected real-worktree hashes remained stable. Plan-owned DoD/status and validate-owned certification remain unchanged.

Reconciled all plan-owned SCOPE-01 DoD checkboxes and execution status from direct report evidence, resolved the test-to-plan transition and plan-reconciliation finding, preserved top-level in_progress and every certification field, and routed the next unexecuted bugfix-fastlane phase to bubbles.regression without claiming any downstream phase.

Re-ran all six SCOPE-01 Test Plan rows plus the cross-spec certified BUG-004 provider-fallback, provider-credentials, and contextual-tooltip suites on current bytes; verdict REGRESSION_FREE. GREEN: all-23 shell canary 3/3 with every route ready (options-flow included); System Chrome shell suite 5/5 with shellReadyAtStart=true, cacheFirstOwnerPainted=true, and exactly-once 12-path hydration; selftest 712/0; regression-quality guard plain+bugfix 0v/0w; BUG-004+tooltip e2e 4/4; provider-credentials 2/2 unit and 11/11 functional with zero credential leaks; contextual-tooltip 5/5 unit and 9/9 functional. Every protected owner (scripts/fetch-options.mjs, rldata.js, shared readiness API rlapp/rlviews/rlexperience, decorators rlg/rlticker/rlcontext) is byte-stable and the change stays confined to options-flow-feed-lab.html plus tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs. One transient batch deepStrictEqual RED was proven a parallel-invocation artifact of running four node --test files in one process and cleared under standalone execution. No planning DoD, scope status, or certification field was modified.

Executed the mandatory bugfix-fastlane simplify phase over the recorded diff surface only. Verdict: NO CODE CHANGE WARRANTED. The fix is one page-local exactly-once guard (deltaHydrationStarted) plus a shell-ready barrier (startDeltaAfterShellReady) that reuses the existing generic rlviews:change event and the data-rlexperience-shell=ready marker with no new shared API, no duplication, no dead code, and self-documenting names; the exactly-once boolean is the adopted design/plan contract and was retained. The only redundancy found (trailing rebuild/render after fetchDelta, which already renders) is pre-existing code relocated verbatim by the fix, outside the fix and simplify remit, and was left byte-stable. The regression test observes same-origin option ordering and forwards unchanged via Reflect.apply (no interception), each assertion mapping to a scenario contract; no safe simplification. Re-confirmed node scripts/selftest.mjs 712 passed / 0 failed on unchanged bytes. options-flow-feed-lab.html, tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs, and tests/tool-experience-shell.functional.mjs left byte-stable; only report.md and state.json were written. Protected owners (BUG-004, rldata.js, provider credential tests, provider-fallback-status.spec.mjs, parent Feature 012 + Scope 04, scripts/fetch-options.mjs, shared readiness API, decorators) and all certification fields untouched.

Executed the mandatory bugfix-fastlane gaps phase over the regression-clean, simplify-confirmed SCOPE-01 fix. Verdict NO CODE GAP: spec/design-to-implementation coherence, scenario coverage, DoD completeness, and research-lab policy are all clean on current bytes. traceability-guard PASSED (3/3 scenarios mapped to Test Plan rows and DoD items, 0 unmapped, no orphan test; TP-BUG001-02 is genuinely non-intercepting via Reflect.apply and rollback-proven RED on regression); artifact-lint PASSED (13/13 DoD checked with evidence blocks, 0 template placeholders, top-level status matches certification); regression-quality --bugfix 0 violations/0 warnings with adversarial signals in both files; added-line forbidden-remedy token scan clean; every protected owner (rldata.js, scripts/fetch-options.mjs, data/options, shared readiness API, decorators) byte-stable against the recorded pre-fix hashes; node scripts/selftest.mjs 712 passed / 0 failed. One artifact-only status drift was found and reconciled truthfully in place: the report Completion Statement and Validation Summary still read SCOPE-01 Not Started / DoD unchecked, a bubbles.test-phase statement (2026-07-24T02:42:02Z) that predated the TR-BUG001-TEST-TO-PLAN reconciliation (2026-07-24T02:57:34Z) which set execution-side SCOPE-01 to Done and checked all 13 DoD items. Only the status clauses were corrected; all evidence transcripts and the historical routing fact are preserved verbatim. No production or test byte modified (options-flow-feed-lab.html, tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs, tests/tool-experience-shell.functional.mjs byte-stable); only report.md and state.json were written. certification.* and top-level status untouched. Route advances to bubbles.harden.

Executed the mandatory bugfix-fastlane harden phase over the gaps-confirmed, regression-clean, simplify-confirmed SCOPE-01 fix on current bytes. Verdict HARDENED / robustnessVerdict ROBUST; no code changed. GREEN: node --test tests/tool-experience-shell.functional.mjs tests 3 / pass 3 / fail 0 / skipped 0 / todo 0 with all 23 registry routes (options-flow-feed-lab included, four panels, one status control); focused System Chrome regression 1 passed with firstDelta=/data/options/SPY.json shellReadyAtStart=true cacheFirstOwnerPainted=true; full tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs System Chrome suite 4 passed / 0 skipped; node scripts/selftest.mjs 712 passed / 0 failed; skip/.only/todo/pending scan and TODO/FIXME/HACK/STUB deferral scan both clean (grep exit 1); bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh exit 0 with all DoD items evidenced and top-level status matching certification; bash .github/bubbles/scripts/regression-quality-guard.sh --bugfix 0 violations / 0 warnings with adversarial signals in both files. The exactly-once barrier is robust across the synchronous data-rlexperience-shell=ready querySelector branch, the {once:true} rlviews:change event branch, and the deltaHydrationStarted guard; single-threaded execution leaves no TOCTOU between check and listen and view toggles do not start a second worker group, so no path leaves hydration unstarted or double-started and nothing routes to bubbles.implement. All 11 protected-owner sha256 (options-flow-feed-lab.html, both test files, rldata.js, scripts/fetch-options.mjs, rlapp.js, rlviews.js, rlexperience.js, rlg.js, rlticker.js, rlcontext.js) match the recorded baseline byte-for-byte. Only report.md (Harden Phase Evidence append) and state.json (phase advance) were written; certification.* and top-level status untouched. Route advances to bubbles.stabilize.

addressedFindings.summary: Created all canonical child bug artifacts, including user validation, scenario manifest, and test plan.
The complete and filtered all-route commands both fail only on the options-flow ready-shell selector at 10 seconds.
Browser diagnostics prove shell resources return early while option render/context work creates multi-second long tasks; holding hydration restores prompt shell readiness.
The first traceability run exposed missing inline Gherkin in scopes.md; the packet was repaired and the identical guard then mapped 3/3 scenarios to Test Plan rows and DoD items with zero warnings.

Discovery, design, plan, and RED phases preserved production bytes; implementation changed only the allowed options-flow-feed-lab.html startup sequence while Feature 012 parent, Scope 04, option data/producer, protected shared modules, and framework-managed bytes remained untouched by this implementation invocation.

Adopted the measured RCA and reconciled the authoritative design around the existing generic shell-ready lifecycle, one page-local exactly-once hydration barrier, protected ownership boundaries, and the mandatory pre-implementation adversarial RED.
Reconciled the one-scope Markdown and JSON handoffs to the adopted design, preserved six-row/six-checkbox parity, and routed the locked pre-fix RED gate to bubbles.test.

Created TP-BUG001-02 and captured its expected pre-fix System Chrome RED: cache-first owner content was painted, but the first native same-origin option delta request started before shared shell readiness.

Applied and reviewed the adopted page-local shell-ready sequencing barrier, preserved synchronous cache-first paint, set one start guard before fetchDelta, retained protected shared/source/worker/timeout boundaries, and observed TP-BUG001-02 GREEN with one 12-path cycle.

Executed TP-BUG001-01 through TP-BUG001-06 and the isolated rollback rehearsal on current bytes. All six rows are GREEN; rollback produces the required shellReadyAtStart=false RED on the recorded pre-fix startup and exact fixed-byte restore returns GREEN with protected hashes unchanged.

Reconciled every plan-owned SCOPE-01 Core, Test, and Build checkbox from direct report evidence; set the execution-side scope status to done; preserved top-level and certification state; and corrected routing to the next mandatory bugfix-fastlane specialist.

Re-ran all six SCOPE-01 Test Plan rows plus the cross-spec certified BUG-004 provider-fallback, provider-credentials, and contextual-tooltip suites on current bytes; every suite GREEN and every protected owner byte-stable. Verdict REGRESSION_FREE. One transient batch deepStrictEqual RED was proven a parallel-invocation artifact and cleared under standalone execution.

Executed the mandatory bugfix-fastlane simplify phase over the recorded diff surface (options-flow-feed-lab.html guard/barrier hunk + tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs BUG-001 regression). No code change warranted: the fix is one page-local exactly-once guard reusing the existing generic rlviews:change event and data-rlexperience-shell=ready marker with no new shared API, duplication, dead code, or unclear naming; the only redundancy (trailing rebuild/render after fetchDelta, which already renders) is pre-existing code relocated verbatim by the fix, outside the fix and simplify remit, and was left byte-stable. Re-confirmed selftest 712/0 on unchanged bytes. Certification and top-level status untouched.

Executed the mandatory bugfix-fastlane gaps phase over the regression-clean, simplify-confirmed SCOPE-01 fix. Verdict NO CODE GAP. traceability-guard PASSED (3/3 scenarios mapped to Test Plan rows and DoD items, 0 unmapped, no orphan test); artifact-lint PASSED (13/13 DoD items checked with evidence blocks, 0 template placeholders, top-level status matches certification); regression-quality --bugfix 0 violations/0 warnings with adversarial signals in both files; added-line forbidden-remedy token scan clean (exit 1); all protected owners byte-stable against recorded pre-fix hashes; node scripts/selftest.mjs 712 passed / 0 failed. One artifact-only status drift was found and reconciled in place: the report Completion Statement and Validation Summary still read SCOPE-01 Not Started / DoD unchecked, a bubbles.test-phase reading that predated the TR-BUG001-TEST-TO-PLAN reconciliation; corrected truthfully while preserving all evidence transcripts and the historical routing fact. No production or test byte modified; certification and top-level status untouched.

Executed the mandatory bugfix-fastlane harden phase over the gaps-confirmed, regression-clean, simplify-confirmed SCOPE-01 fix. Verdict HARDENED / robustnessVerdict ROBUST on current bytes. GREEN: all-23 functional shell canary tests 3 / pass 3 / fail 0 / skipped 0 (options-flow-feed-lab present with four panels); focused BUG-001 System Chrome regression 1 passed with firstDelta=/data/options/SPY.json shellReadyAtStart=true cacheFirstOwnerPainted=true; full tool-experience.spec.mjs shell suite 4 passed / 0 skipped; node scripts/selftest.mjs 712 passed / 0 failed; skip/only and TODO/FIXME/HACK/STUB scans clean (grep exit 1); artifact-lint PASSED exit 0; regression-quality --bugfix 0 violations / 0 warnings with adversarial signals in both files. The exactly-once barrier is robust across the synchronous already-ready querySelector branch, the {once:true} rlviews:change event branch, and the deltaHydrationStarted guard, with no unstarted/double-started race and no second worker group on view toggles. No code changed: options-flow-feed-lab.html, tests/tool-experience.spec.mjs, tests/tool-experience-shell.functional.mjs and all shared/producer/decorator owners are byte-identical to the recorded baseline (11/11 sha256 match). certification.* and top-level status untouched.

unresolvedFindings.summary: The mandatory bugfix-fastlane harden phase executed with a HARDENED / ROBUST verdict on current bytes (all-23 functional canary 3/3 pass 0 skip; focused BUG-001 System Chrome regression GREEN with shellReadyAtStart=true and cacheFirstOwnerPainted=true; full tool-experience shell suite 4/4; selftest 712/0; skip/only and deferral scans clean; artifact-lint exit 0; regression-quality 0v/0w; all 11 protected-owner hashes byte-stable; no code changed). The subsequent mandatory stabilize phase has not executed.

sequence.action: Create TP-BUG001-02 and record the persistent adversarial RED against unchanged production while retaining the exact all-23 RED.
Apply the smallest adopted startup-sequencing repair without changing protected owners or timeouts, only after the persistent RED is recorded.
Execute focused, exact all-23, broader E2E, ownership, regression-quality, rollback, and broad selftest rows.
Reconcile the complete test evidence into plan-owned DoD checkboxes and SCOPE-01 status without modifying certification.
Execute the mandatory regression phase and return its diagnostic verdict without modifying planning or certification.
Execute the mandatory simplify phase only after regression completes.
Execute the mandatory gaps phase only after simplify completes.
Execute the mandatory harden phase only after gaps completes.
Execute the mandatory stabilize phase only after harden completes.
Execute the mandatory devops phase only after stabilize completes.
Execute the mandatory security phase only after devops completes.
Certify only after every preceding bugfix-fastlane phase has produced its required verdict.
Execute the independent audit only after validate completes.

routing.dispatchReason: Plan reconciliation is complete from direct report evidence. The persisted bugfix-fastlane definition resolves to phaseOrder select, bootstrap, implement, test, regression, simplify, gaps, harden, stabilize, devops, security, validate, audit, finalize; regression is the first unexecuted required specialist phase.
